Cottage kitchen with bundles of lavender and thyme hanging from oak beams, bubbling cauldron steaming.
Sunlit herb garden with raised cedar beds, stone paths winding between bee balm and chamomile.
Apothecary den with floor-to-ceiling shelves holding hundreds of labeled jars filled with dried botanicals.
Forest clearing with herb bundles drying on wooden racks beside a low-burning juniper fire.
Cool root cellar lined with preserves, braided garlic, mushroom strings, and amber tincture bottles.
Kitchen windowsill overflowing with basil, rosemary, and mint in mismatched terracotta pots, dawn light pouring in.
Ramshackle greenhouse built from salvaged windows, humid air thick with ferns and trailing jasmine vines.
Village market stall draped with dried flower bundles, sachets, salves, and hand-labeled remedy bottles.
Weathered cottage porch wrapped in purple wisteria, climbing roses, and hanging ferns swaying gently.
Mossy stream bank thick with wild mint, watercress, and valerian growing in cool shade.
Candlelit writing desk buried under open herbals, pressed flowers between pages, quill and ink nearby.
Ancient stone bridge draped in moss where she harvests brooklime and forget-me-nots from water's edge.
Garden potting shed with terra cotta pots stacked high, seed packets scattered, soil-dusted wooden bench.
Attic drying room with rafters strung with nettle, yarrow, and elderflower, dusty sunlight filtering through.
Hearthside armchair surrounded by mortar and pestle, remedy journals, and teacups filled with cooling infusions.
Wildflower meadow workshop under a canvas canopy, harvest baskets overflowing with fresh calendula and clover.
Stone springhouse with crocks of fermenting tonics cooling in clear water flowing through shallow channels.
Forest hut draped in ivy, doorway framed by foxgloves, interior glimpsed through windows glowing amber.
Garden gate arbor heavy with honeysuckle and hops, gravel path leading to beds of medicinal roots.
Clay-walled stillroom with copper alembic distilling rose water, shelves of oils and hydrosols gleaming.
Cottage loft bedroom with sachets tucked in quilts, dried roses hanging overhead, herbal dream pillows stacked.
Woodland glade with fallen log workbench, foraging basket, and mushroom field guide open beside lichen samples.
Brick courtyard garden with espaliered apple trees, raised beds of culinary herbs, buzzing with afternoon pollinators.
Candlelit bathing room with bundles of eucalyptus hanging from shower, shelves of handmade botanical soaps.
Morning garden path through dewy sage and lemon balm, wicker basket ready for harvest at golden hour.
